CustomField.formula: IF( Flosum__Patch__c != null, IF( Flosum__Patch__r.RecordType.Name = 'Repository', Flosum__Patch__r.Flosum__Total_Items_in_Patch_Repository__c , IF(Flosum__Patch__r.RecordType.Name = 'PatchManifest', Flosum__Patch__r.Flosum__Total_Items__c , Flosum__Patch__r.Flosum__Total_Items_in_Patch__c)), Flosum__Snapshot__r.Flosum__No_of_Metadata_Items__c )
CustomField.label: Total Items
